author: Humanly
text: CORRECTION: strike the 'delivered_in must bound its grep at the current incarnation's creation' subtlety from this topic — it conflated two different git logs. delivered_in greps the DELIVERY log (project repo integration branch), not the balls task log (balls/tasks). The cross-incarnation grep ambiguity is the delivery plugin's concern, not core's, and is resolved by an extension-owned field (delivery writes delivered_in at close.pre) rather than core bounding a grep. Moved to bl-934a. This topic's recency-resolution discipline now applies cleanly to the balls task log only.
